description_long: This rifle features a compact, robust design with a predominantly matte black metal body and a wooden pistol grip. The main receiver is cylindrical with various mechanical details, including adjustment knobs, rails, and a prominent side-mounted box, likely for power or ammunition. The barrel is short and thick, with a large cylindrical muzzle device at the front, suggesting a specialized function such as a suppressor or launcher. The top of the rifle is equipped with a simple iron sight, and the overall construction appears solid and utilitarian, suitable for urban tactical scenarios. The wooden grip contrasts with the otherwise industrial appearance, providing ergonomic support. The rifle's compactness and heavy build indicate it is designed for close-quarters or specialized urban operations.
description: A compact, matte black rifle with a wooden pistol grip, short thick barrel, and detailed mechanical components, suited for urban tactical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden grip, cylindrical receiver, and prominent muzzle device.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large muzzle device, barrel opening, and alignment of the iron sight.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden grip, mechanical details, and side-mounted box.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wooden grip and the back of the receiver, with the sight alignment visible.
